name: Aberdeen Sports Village Track
metaTitle: Aberdeen Sports Village Athletics Track | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Aberdeen Sports Village athletics track.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 05:30–22:30, Sat–Sun 08:30–17:00. Note that specific areas may be reserved for club sessions (4pm-8pm weekdays).

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via membership or paid drop-in sessions. Contact ASV for current track-specific rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A certified 8-lane 400m outdoor track with full field facilities and an indoor 135m sprint straight.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking for up to 3 hours for users and visitors across four large car parks.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Aberdeen Sports Village website for memberships and facility bookings.
